user.title: Connect to ASN Bank via Enable Banking
user.description: Paste the JWT (bearer token) for your Enable Banking application and the session ID you received after authorising access at ASN Bank. See the README for how to obtain these.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Enable Banking
reauth_confirm.description: Your Enable Banking session has expired or been revoked. Start a new authorisation at ASN Bank, then paste the new JWT and session ID here.

error.invalid_auth: The JWT was rejected — check that it is signed with your application's private key and has not expired.
error.invalid_session: The session ID is unknown, revoked, or expired — re-authorise at ASN Bank and try again.

init.title: ASN Bank Balance options
init.description: How often to poll for a new balance. PSD2 caps unattended polling at 4/day per consent, so values below 6 hours (21600 s) are not recommended.
